channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
item.description: [BBC Technology] However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

item.title: 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context
item.description: [MarTech] AI bias often starts before the model runs. Missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distort outputs. Here's how to correct them. The post 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption
item.description: [MarTech] Executives set the vision and teams test tools, but transformation happens in the middle. Equip managers to drive AI-powered workflow change. The post Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] AI is delivering its clearest ROI so far not in marketing, but in fraud, where criminals are scaling persuasion faster and more effectively than most businesses. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale
item.description: [MarTech] ActiveCampaign’s new AI tools alert you to what’s working in your campaigns and beyond and how to fix what isn’t — no prompting required. The post ActiveCampaign extends its AI capabilities with context and scale appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like
item.description: [MarTech] AI is transforming entry-level marketing roles from execution to oversight, forcing teams to rethink how junior talent contributes and grows. The post AI is reshaping what entry-level marketing work looks like appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Amazon's Alexa has had an AI upgrade. Now she's got more to say
item.description: [BBC Technology] There has been criticism the Echo has stagnated, while other AI chatbots have become much easier to communicate with.

item.title: Wait it out, hold on to gold? What investors in S’pore can do as ‘stagflation’ risk mounts
item.description: [Straits Times] As the conflict in the Middle East continues, experts say much depends on how long it lasts.

item.title: OCBC’s $71.6m claim over capsized oil rig fails at Singapore’s highest court after 5-year battle
item.description: [Straits Times] OCBC, as the mortgagee, was named a co-assured and sole loss payee under the policy.

item.title: Do you want to build a robot snowman?
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.

item.title: Cursor admits its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI’s Kimi
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Building on top of a Chinese model feels particularly fraught right now.

item.title: Crimson Desert dev apologizes for use of AI art
item.description: [The Verge AI] Reviews of Crimson Desert have been mixed, but the bigger issue for the game has been the discovery of what appeared to be AI-generated assets in the final release. Now the developer has acknowledged that AI art was indeed used during the game's creation, but says that it was intended to be replaced

item.title: Elon Musk unveils chip manufacturing plans for SpaceX and Tesla
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Elon Musk recently outlined ambitious plans for a chip-building collaboration Tesla and SpaceX — but he has a history of overpromising.

item.title: 第二代VLA落地之后，小鹏不想只做一家卖车公司
item.description: [钛媒体] 第二代VLA开始规模化落地，意味着其技术投入正转化为产品力和商业效率，它开始像一家物理AI平台公司。

item.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

item.title: Musk says he’s building Terafab chip plant in Austin, Texas
item.description: [The Verge AI] Elon Musk announced plans to build a Terafab plant in Austin, Texas, that will be jointly run by Tesla and SpaceX. The goal is to eventually build chips at scale for robotics, artificial intelligence, and space-based data centers for Musk's various companies. Musk has expressed concern, as have othe

item.title: 华晨宇进军日化家居赛道，与小阔集团共同创立品牌「重点」｜项目报道
item.description: [36氪] 3 月 22 日，小阔集团携手华晨宇正式推出全新日化家居品牌「重点」，华晨宇出任品牌联合创始人。 此次华晨宇的加入并非传统的品牌代言，而是形成了深度的绑定。从股权结构来看，「重点」的运营主体为深圳华阔生物科技有限公司，其中小阔集团旗下子公司深圳星阔生物科技有限公司持股 70%，华晨宇控股的上海圣恒鸿音文化传播有限公司持股 20%，北京云上万家科技有限公司持股 10%。 在消费理念不断迭代的当下，日化行业早已脱离单纯的基础功能满足阶段，消费者对产品的成分、功效、使用体验乃至情绪价值都提出了更高要求，需求精细化、场景细分化、体验个性化成为行业显著趋势。正是洞察到这一市场变化，「重点」应运而

item.title: 用AI让游戏更好玩，只是腾讯关心的第二个问题
item.description: [36氪] 文｜兰杰 编辑｜乔芊 3月19日，腾讯发布了2025年全年以及Q4的财报，表现依然稳健。其中，游戏仍是腾讯的基本盘业务，贡献了超30%的收入。 2025年，腾讯本土市场游戏的收入为1642亿元，同比增长18%，得益于《三角洲行动》的强劲表现，以及《王者荣耀》、《和平精英》等长青游戏及《无畏契约》系列(个人电脑端及移动端)的收入增长。 国际市场游戏收入为774亿元，同比增长33%，得益于 Supercell 旗下游戏及《PUBG MOBILE》的收入增长，以及《鸣潮》 的增量收入贡献。 回顾过去一年，AI毋庸置疑是腾讯的核心关键词，也是其游戏业务的核心关键词。 在财报和业

item.title: An exclusive tour of Amazon’s Trainium lab, the chip that’s won over Anthropic, OpenAI, even Apple
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Shortly after Amazon announced its $50 billion investment in OpenAI, AWS invited me on a private tour of the chip lab at the heart of the deal.

item.title: AI was everywhere at gaming’s big developer conference — except the games
item.description: [The Verge AI] AI was everywhere at the GDC Festival of Gaming this year. Vendors at the event pitched generative AI tools for things like making AI-driven NPCs and even entire games from a chat box. On the show floor, I spent 10 minutes playing a demo of a pixel-art fantasy world generated by Tencent's AI tools.

item.title: 宇树冲击IPO，王兴兴的“价格屠刀”能否砍出下一个万亿赛道？
item.description: [钛媒体] 宇树科技冲击科创板IPO，人形机器人市场融资超200亿。

item.title: 为什么字节难以招架版权纠纷，而OpenAI和Anthropic却能赢？
item.description: [钛媒体] AI时代的版权攻防：模型厂由强转弱

item.title: Philippines allows temporary use of dirtier fuel amid Middle East crisis
item.description: [CNA Tech] Only vehicles from model year 2015 and earlier, traditional jeepneys, power plants and generators, and the marine and shipping sectors would be allowed to use Euro-II compliant petroleum products.

item.title: AI时代，为什么我们还没等到真正的“超级AI助理”？
item.description: [钛媒体] 现阶段的AI工具大多处于碎片化阶段，难以跑通真实的复杂工作流。未来提效核心不在于指令，而在于构建“AI友好型SOP”，通过业务潜规则显性化来填补技术与需求的鸿沟，形成真正的生产力。

item.title: 人比狗更赚钱？宇树招股书里的三个真相
item.description: [钛媒体] 宇树的招股书证明，在AI时代，两条腿比四条腿更值钱。

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Straits Times] The software will appear as a contact in WeChat, allowing users to connect directly with OpenClaw.

item.title: Tencent integrates WeChat with OpenClaw AI agent amid China tech battle
item.description: [Business Times] The software, called ClawBot, will appear as a contact within China’s most popular app

item.title: Property stocks in S’pore fall while banks gain as higher-for-longer rates reshape market outlook
item.description: [Straits Times] Property stocks fell this week as the US Federal Reserve signalled that rates may stay higher for longer.

item.title: 腾讯AI合二为一，姚顺雨第一个大模型混元3.0稳了？
item.description: [钛媒体] 实验室模式终结，大厂不再需要AI Lab

item.title: Are AI tokens the new signing bonus or just a cost of doing business?
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Maybe tokens really will become the fourth pillar of engineering compensation. But engineers might want to hold the line before embracing this as a straightforward win.

item.title: OpenAI plans to almost double its headcount in 2026: FT report
item.description: [Straits Times] The firm has taken new office space in San Francisco to accommodate its growing staff count.

item.title: China to allow more banks to handle digital renminbi, sources say
item.description: [Straits Times] As at last November, digital renminbi transactions had notched a cumulative value of $3.1 trillion since launch.

item.title: Nothing在中国发布Headphone (a)与Phone (4a)系列，在性能过剩时代继续押注“设计优先”丨最前线
item.description: [36氪] 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 3月20日，总部位于伦敦的消费科技公司Nothing在中国上海召开新品发布会，正式推出头戴式耳机Headphone(a)和智能手机Phone(4a)系列。这是Nothing第二次在中国以线下发布会形式发布新品，显示出其对中国市场的投入正在逐步加深。 从定价来看，Headphone(a)国内首销价为1299元，Phone(4a)起售价为3299元（12GB+256GB），Pro版本售价4199元。两款产品均定位中端市场，处于各自品类中竞争最为密集的价格区间。头戴式耳机市场已是成熟赛道，索尼、Bose、苹果等品牌在降噪算法、音质调校和生态协同上建立了深厚壁垒。

item.title: AI videos of sexualised black women removed from TikTok after BBC investigation
item.description: [BBC Technology] Dozens of Instagram and TikTok accounts have used AI avatars to promote explicit content, the BBC finds.

item.title: OpenAI to introduce ads to all ChatGPT free and Go users in US
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: The gen AI Kool-Aid tastes like eugenics
item.description: [The Verge AI] Like many people, director Valerie Veatch was intrigued when OpenAI first released its Sora text-to-video generative AI model to the public in 2024. Though she didn't fully understand the technology, she was curious about what it could do, and she saw that other artists were building online communit

item.title: OpenAI to nearly double workforce to 8,000 by end-2026, FT reports
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Gemini task automation is slow, clunky, and super impressive
item.description: [The Verge AI] I've been testing out Gemini's new task automation on the Pixel 10 Pro and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, which for the first time lets Gemini take the wheel and use apps for you. It's limited to a small subset right now - a handful of food delivery and rideshare services - and it's still in […]

item.title: I Tried DoorDash’s Tasks App and Saw the Bleak Future of AI Gig Work
item.description: [WIRED AI] I recorded videos of myself doing laundry, scrambling eggs, and walking around the park in DoorDash’s new Tasks app, where gig workers are paid to train AI.

item.title: Cyberattack on a Car Breathalyzer Firm Leaves Drivers Stuck
item.description: [WIRED AI] Plus: The FBI admits it’s buying phone data to track Americans, Iranian hackers disrupt medical care at Maryland hospitals, and more.

item.title: 'Jury Duty Presents: Company Retreat' Almost Makes Corporate Culture Seem Fun
item.description: [WIRED AI] The Amazon Prime prank series amplifies the hijinks of workplace dynamics, while showing how people find purpose—and community—in their jobs despite impossible situations.

item.title: 9点1氪：傅盛凌晨开撕周鸿祎称“被欠1个亿”，360回应；字节跳动413亿元卖掉沐瞳科技；伊朗战事持续或致油价升至180美元
item.description: [36氪] 今日热点导览 商务部部长王文涛会见苹果公司首席执行官库克 贾国龙起家的西贝首店将缩减一半经营面积 特斯拉计划采购中国光伏设备？企业回应：确有此事 针对“漂白鸡爪”等“3·15”晚会曝光问题，多地立案溯源打击 中国学生平均留学预算超60万 TOP3大新闻 傅盛微信群里开撕周鸿祎称“欠钱不还”，360回应 3月20日，社交媒体流传的截图显示，当天凌晨，猎豹移动董事长兼CEO傅盛在微信聊天群里“开撕”360创始人周鸿祎，指责周鸿祎“欠钱不还，并遭拉黑”。 3月20日，360集团回应称，“我们更关注把产品做好，让每个人都能用上安全便捷的360安全龙虾。企业家打造个人

item.title: Anthropic Denies It Could Sabotage AI Tools During War
item.description: [WIRED AI] The Department of Defense alleges the AI developer could manipulate models in the middle of war. Company executives argue that’s impossible.

item.title: Mexico's Femsa cuts workers at Spin fintech division
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir AI as core US military system: Memo
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: There Aren’t a Lot of Reasons to Get Excited About a New Amazon Smartphone
item.description: [WIRED AI] The company is reportedly building a new AI-powered mobile device. If Amazon follows through on the plan, experts warn it would be next to impossible to break into a crowded market.

item.title: Gamers Hate Nvidia's DLSS 5. Developers Aren’t Crazy About It, Either
item.description: [WIRED AI] Nvidia’s new AI upscaling gaming technology struck gamers as uncanny and off-putting. Developers don't seem to like it, either, but it could be “the default” in a few years.

item.title: Trump takes another shot at dismantling state AI regulation
item.description: [The Verge AI] The Trump administration on Friday unveiled its new legislative blueprint for AI regulation, and the seven-point plan includes a clear message: The federal government should avoid many AI regulations beyond a set of child safety rules, and it should bar states from messing with the "national strateg

item.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
item.description: [BBC Technology] The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

item.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
item.description: [BBC Technology] The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

item.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
item.description: [BBC Technology] Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.

item.title: Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website
item.description: [MarTech] Walmart’s test shows AI-driven checkout may simplify buying, but it still converts far worse than traditional ecommerce experiences. The post Walmart says ChatGPT checkout converted 3x worse than its own website appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 万物云：与万科关联应收账款余额仅剩20.6亿，业务独立性持续增强
item.description:
[36氪] 3月19日晚间，万物云空间科技服务股份有限公司发布2025年度业绩报告。报告期内，万物云实现营业收入372.7亿元，同比增长2.7%，剔除开发商相关业务后，营收同比增长8.4%；核心净利润约21.3亿元，同比微增0.8%；归母净利润7.7亿元，同比出现较大幅度下滑。
业绩发布会现场 万物云董事长朱保全在业绩发布会上表示，关联开发商（万科）产生的坏账及资产摊销所带来的负向影响是利润下滑的主要原因，2025年全年因此产生了7.4亿元的净利润负影响，这是一个“被动”的发生过程，但报告期内公司持续关联交易收入同比降低11.97亿元，占比已进一步下降至6%，占比持续下降，独立性越来越强。

item.title: Unitree plans 4.2 billion yuan Shanghai IPO, testing interest in humanoid robots
item.description: [Business Times] IPO is one of China’s biggest domestic tech listings in years

item.title: How a Vietnamese beauty startup landed a US$38 million exit
item.description: [Business Times] The Skinetiq deal with Marico marks a rare startup exit in Vietnam

item.title: 沙特土豪超60亿美元收购沐瞳：公司架构不变，张云帆仍是CEO
item.description: [36氪] 3月20日，沐瞳科技发布公司内部信，宣布公司已被沙特阿拉伯主权财富基金全资控股的游戏巨头Savvy Games Group（简称Savvy）收购。 自字节游戏业务调整后，这场交易就早有传闻，去年底已经有了大致轮廓。双方在2025下半年正式启动谈判，并在2026年初围绕核心条款达成共识，最后Savvy以超60亿美元的价格收购沐瞳的全部股权。 这场交易距离字节收购沐瞳只有5年——彼时的收购价格为40亿美元，如果考虑到谈判和双方讨论时间，这个出售间隔可能更短。 而从内部信来看，此次交易后，沐瞳的管理结构仍旧保持不变，张云帆会继续担任沐瞳CEO。在此基础上，公司还会针对员工的历史贡献及未来
